THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CHRISTOPHER A $2,447.05 PRINCIPAL, $247.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,694.05, SEE SCANNED DOC
